name: Mock Multiple Inputs

steps.code: input.data = Array.from({ length: input.count }, (_, i) => i * 2);
steps.name: Generate Data
steps.description: Simulates generating data from an external source. Flagged as mock so each input gets its own cassette.

steps.code:
input.sum = input.data.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
input.average = input.sum / input.data.length;
steps.name: Summarize

pipeDescription: Test that cassettes are isolated per test input. Two different inputs should produce two different cassette directories, each with their own recorded state.
